'''sanasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:king|king]]". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-n-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:king|king]]
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sanasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sænæshæth|sænæshæth]] || [[word:sænæshæj|sænæshæj]] || [[word:sænæshæsh|sænæshæsh]] || [[word:sænæshæ|sænæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sananashath|sananashath]] || [[word:sananashaj|sananashaj]] || [[word:sananashash|sananashash]] || [[word:sananasha|sananasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sanashath|sanashath]] || [[word:sanashaj|sanashaj]] || [[word:sanashash|sanashash]] || [[word:sanasha|sanasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sanafshath|sanafshath]] || [[word:sanafshaj|sanafshaj]] || [[word:sanafshash|sanafshash]] || [[word:sanafshaf|sanafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sanashatha|sanashatha]] || [[word:sanashaja|sanashaja]] || [[word:sanashasha|sanashasha]] || [[word:sanashaka|sanashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sanashath|sanashath]] || [[word:sanashaj|sanashaj]] || [[word:sanashash|sanashash]] || [[word:sanasha|sanasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sanashathal|sanashathal]] || [[word:sanashajal|sanashajal]] || [[word:sanashashal|sanashashal]] || [[word:sanashakal|sanashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sanashathatha|sanashathatha]] || [[word:sanashajaja|sanashajaja]] || [[word:sanashashasha|sanashashasha]] || [[word:sanashaka|sanashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sanashathan|sanashathan]] || [[word:sanashajan|sanashajan]] || [[word:sanashashan|sanashashan]] || [[word:sanashakan|sanashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sanashathaoro|sanashathaoro]] || [[word:sanashajaoro|sanashajaoro]] || [[word:sanashashaoro|sanashashaoro]] || [[word:sanashakaoro|sanashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
